creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: Well, a couple things here. For one, your attached log shows no failed build (unless you didn't paste enough of the log into the attachment). For two, I am a bit torn about this bug report because I have been trying to update the port to 1.8.7 but this caused some issues which is why the port was reverted back to 1.8.3.1.
